title: Nuclei-seq Protocol
author: Mandy Xu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8b8hsrw

steps.title: Rack 4 falcon tubes (lysis buff,...
steps.instruction: Rack 4 falcon tubes (lysis buff, wash buff, nuclei, intermediate) and 1 FACS tube on ice

steps.title: Chill centrifuges (4°C 800 g 10...
steps.instruction: Chill centrifuges (4°C 800 g 10 min), clean hood, fill Styrofoam boxes: one with dry ice (petri dish and razor blade); one with ice packed and slanted for petri dish away from the user; one with ice with falcon tubes (above), 1 weighed epp tube and douncer with A pestle; Clean douncer, pestle and forceps with ethanol, wrap forceps and ethanol again; Pestle B and forceps on kimwipe beside ice in hood; Ranin wide bore tips and p1000;

steps.title: Prep 5 epi tubes on a rack by scope
steps.instruction: Prep 5 epi tubes on a rack by scope: Three for checking the completion of lysis; One for final resuspension for FACs " leave on ice; One for counting.

steps.title: Weigh tissue (30-50mg ideal, save rest)...
steps.instruction: Weigh tissue (30-50mg ideal, save rest) and cut tissue into 1-2mm3 using a chilled razor on dry ice

steps.title: Add lysis buffer (enough to cover)...
steps.instruction: Add lysis buffer (enough to cover) and transfer to the ice to continue chopping, using a pipette to rinse off blade using the lysis buffer of the sample

steps.title: Transfer to nuclei tube and lysis for 5 min
steps.instruction: Transfer to nuclei tube and lysis for 5 min

steps.title: Dounce supernatant first (1-2 strokes) and transfer to 4th tube
steps.instruction: Dounce supernatant first (1-2 strokes) and transfer to 4th tube

steps.title: Dounce pellet in thirds (2 strokes)
steps.instruction: Dounce pellet in thirds (2 strokes)

steps.title: Add enough lysis buffer to resuspend...
steps.instruction: Add enough lysis buffer to resuspend pellet in douncer, dounce and transfer to 4th tube

steps.title: Douncing is done when solution appears milky
steps.instruction: Douncing is done when solution appears milky

steps.title: Resuspend 4th tube with wide bore...
steps.instruction: Resuspend 4th tube with wide bore tip and check with residual on tip and tip of p20 in SYBR using countess chips

steps.title: Transfer super to nuclei tube, leaving behind thepellet
steps.instruction: Transfer super to nuclei tube, leaving behind thepellet

steps.title: Transfer pellet back to douncer and...
steps.instruction: Transfer pellet back to douncer and dounce with pestle B (1/3-1/2 of pellet depending on toughness) " 2-4 strokes

steps.title: Rinse out douncer with lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Rinse out douncer with lysis buffer

steps.title: Transfer to nuclei tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to nuclei tube

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei and count again with...
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei and count again with leftover in p1000 tip " dounce again based on results

steps.title: Spin at 800g for 10 min
steps.instruction: Spin at 800g for 10 min

steps.title: Wash with 2ml of wash buffer
steps.instruction: Wash with 2ml of wash buffer

steps.title: Spin at 800g for 10 min
steps.instruction: Spin at 800g for 10 min

steps.title: Wash again with 2ml of wash buffer
steps.instruction: Wash again with 2ml of wash buffer

steps.title: Spin for 10 min at 800g and resuspend in 1ml
steps.instruction: Spin for 10 min at 800g and resuspend in 1ml

steps.title: Filter with 40um Flowmi cell strainer, transfer to 1
steps.instruction: Filter with 40um Flowmi cell strainer, transfer to 1.5ml LoBind tube on ice

steps.title: Count nucleiSpin at 800g for 10 min
steps.instruction: Count nucleiSpin at 800g for 10 min

steps.title: Wash again with 2ml of wash buffer
steps.instruction: Wash again with 2ml of wash buffer

steps.title: Spin for 10 min at 800g and resuspend in 1ml
steps.instruction: Spin for 10 min at 800g and resuspend in 1ml

steps.title: Filter with 40um Flowmi cell strainer, transfer to 1
steps.instruction: Filter with 40um Flowmi cell strainer, transfer to 1.5ml LoBind tube on ice

steps.title: Count nuclei
steps.instruction: Count nuclei

steps.title: 40ul buff + 5ul nuclei If...
steps.instruction: 40ul buff + 5ul nuclei If >1 million use 10ul of DAPI If <1 million use 6-8ul of DAPI DAPI requires 5 min incubation

steps.title: Make note of nuclei condition, number...
steps.instruction: Make note of nuclei condition, number of strokes, nuclei size etc after loading

steps.title: DO NOT DISCARD THE WASH AND...
steps.instruction: DO NOT DISCARD THE WASH AND RESUSPENSION BUFFER, KEEP IT ON ICE.

steps.title: After FACS, Spin at 800g for...
steps.instruction: After FACS, Spin at 800g for 10 min, resuspend the pellet in cold wash and resuspension buffer (volume calculated so that the final conc is around 1000nuclei/ul)

steps.title: Count and take images
steps.instruction: Count and take images

steps.title: Make note of nuclei condition, number...
steps.instruction: Make note of nuclei condition, number of strokes, nuclei size etc after loading

steps.title: Stain the nuclei with DAPI at...
steps.instruction: Stain the nuclei with DAPI at the concentration suggested by the manufacturer.

steps.title: Cell sorter
steps.instruction: Cell sorter: Influx BRV (TMDT, LAB 2-504), sorting for 1-1.5hrs.

steps.title: Gating
steps.instruction: Gating: DAPI positive, and exclude any debris/ nuclei aggregates within the DAPI positive gating.

steps.title: Collect nuclei in the Wash and Resuspension Buffer
steps.instruction: Collect nuclei in the Wash and Resuspension Buffer.

steps.title: Wash the nuclei with the Wash and Resuspension Buffer
steps.instruction: Wash the nuclei with the Wash and Resuspension Buffer.

steps.title: Count the nuclei and proceed to...
steps.instruction: Count the nuclei and proceed to 10X 3’ RNA seq directly.

steps.title: After FACS, Spin at 800g for...
steps.instruction: After FACS, Spin at 800g for 10 min, remove the supernatant (sheath buffer+ wash and resuspension buffer), resuspend the pellet in a fresh, cold wash and resuspension buffer (volume calculated so that the final conc is around 1000nuclei/ul)Stain the nuclei with DAPI at concentration suggested by the manufacturer.
